title: RVT.BSP.004.ENVELOPE_PERIOD_WITHOUT_CONSUMPTION — Envelope closed without consumption (counter-intuitive relapse signal)
description: Domain-event-DDD payload published by AGG.BSP.004.ENV.PERIOD_BUDGET on CMD.CLOSE_PERIOD, for each envelope whose consumed_amount is at or below `unconsumed_threshold * cap_amount`. COUNTER-INTUITIVE relapse signal: the absence of usage indicates a probable bypass of the controlled channel. Consumed downstream by CAP.BSP.001.SIG to qualify the signal.

consumed_amount.description: Total consumed_amount at closure. By construction <= cap_amount * unconsumed_threshold.

unconsumed_threshold.description: Fraction of cap_amount used as the unconsumed threshold (default 0.05). Carried for downstream interpretation.

causation_event_id.description: Identifier of the upstream timer / period-due event.
